title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 38–41, this part focuses on Unknown person #36, Unknown person #37, Unknown person #38, Unknown person #39, King as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Do you have the resolve ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: ...to stay alive?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: I've been ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: ...on an adven- tune.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Hey !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: The PRIN- CESS is SPEAK- ING!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: I've waited so long for this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: She's really alive! What a relief!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: The ceremony's starting!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She was supposed to speak two hours ago. Why the delay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Hmmm ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: I hope the people don't riot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Koza !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Hey, Koza!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Hurry, it's begun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Vivi is giving her speech!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: The loud- speakers are at full blast.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: The whole town can hear.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: it was...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...A journey of hope across a sea of despair.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I left Alabama and set sail upon the vast, dark ocean.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: I visited unbelievably amazing islands.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I saw creatures I'd never imagined and landscapes out of a dream.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At times the sound of the ocean waves...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: ...was sooth- ing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: ...Gently enveloping me and easing my cares.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: At other times it was harsh ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: ...mocking me and playing on my fears.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But in the darkness of the storm, I encountered a little ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: It gave me a push and said...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: "Don't you see that light?"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That strange little ship never lost its way even in the dark.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: "Look, there's the light."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: It would dance on the giant waves.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It didn't resist the tugs of the tides, but sailed ahead through the roughest headwinds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: and pointing forward, it said...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
